---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## SDG / DPG Relevance

If applicable, how does this feature contribute to SDG 3 (Good Health), SDG 16 (Peace & Justice), or the project's DPG certification goals?

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
